items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This regularly scheduled security update resolves critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities that could lead to arbitrary code execution, security feature bypass, and privilege escalation.

items.title: Unauthenticated PHP object injection in Mirasvit Cache Warmer
items.summary: Sansec discovered a critical unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer, a popular Magento extension, allowing remote code execution via a crafted cookie.

items.title: Unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce REST API
items.summary: Sansec discovered the PolyShell vulnerability, a critical flaw in Magento's REST API that allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files disguised as images, potentially leading to remote code execution and account takeover.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This security update addresses multiple critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities that could lead to security feature bypass, application denial-of-service, privilege escalation, arbitrary code execution, and arbitrary file system read.
